case_title: ZENGGUANG YANG VS. VLADIMIR BORUKOVICH et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, ZENGGUANG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO JUDGE FILED BY DEFENDANT BORUKOVICH, VLADIMIR PINTCHOUK, KARINA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BORUKOVICH, VLADIMIR PINTCHOUK, KARINA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,797.85 FILED BY YANG, ZENGGUANG AS TO DEFENDANT BORUKOVICH, VLADIMIR PINTCHOUK, KARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER DOROTHY WONG PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANG, ZENGGUANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORUKOVICH, VLADIMIR PINTCHOUK, KARINA $1,797.85 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,797.85, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S JUDGMENT FOR ANY AMOUNTS DEFENDANT HAS ALRADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT NOT FOUND". FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, ZENGGUANG AS TO DEFENDANT PINTCHOUK, KARINA
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, ZENGGUANG AS TO DEFENDANT BORUKOVICH, VLADIMIR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(AMENDED)* (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED MAR-28-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BORUKOVICH, VLADIMIR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED APR-11-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINTCHOUK, KARINA
ORDER ON DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT-REQUEST IS GRANTED
